sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94159" key="silourismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σῐλουρ-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n94159.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">eating of a</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">σίλουρος</foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">serving it up</tr_> at table, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0447.tlg001:17:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Diph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">17.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
